## Description
<!-- 
  Provide a clear, concise description of the changes.
  Link to related issue if applicable.
-->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New skill / MCP server (high quality, documented)
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill/MCP/showcase/template
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style and quality bar of this repo (see AGENTS.md and CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (README, skill frontmatter, MCP READMEs, etc.)
- [ ] New skills include excellent `description` for auto-invocation and Plan Mode guidance
- [ ] New MCPs include security model documentation and a driving skill pattern
- [ ] I have tested the changes with `grok inspect` and/or actual Grok Build sessions where relevant
- [ ] Changes are attributed properly (core work by Cobus Greyling; contributions credited)

## Screenshots / Evidence (if applicable)
<!-- For UI changes, new skills in action, MCP demos, etc. -->

## Additional notes for reviewers
<!-- Especially useful for complex refactors, new architecture, or meta changes -->
